project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite budget tracker SPA with Tailwind CSS v4
build_system: Vite with @tailwindcss/vite plugin; bun as package manager (npm/node not available)
test_command: No test command available - validate via TypeScript compilation and Vite build
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'bunx tsc -b' to verify TypeScript compiles without errors. 2. Run 'bunx vite build' to verify Vite builds successfully.
environment_constraints: Node.js/npm not available. Use 'bun' for package management and 'bunx' for running scripts. Network is OPEN_INTERNET.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Follow existing patterns in the codebase.
key_patterns: Components use functional React with hooks. State is managed via useState and a custom useLocalStorage hook. Tailwind CSS v4 via @tailwindcss/vite plugin (no tailwind.config.js). All components use semantic HTML (section, header, footer, main, nav, article, fieldset, legend). Currency is currently formatted with '$' + .toFixed(2) inline in components. Tailwind dark mode works via 'dark:' variant when 'dark' class is on <html>. index.css has only '@import tailwindcss'. The app has a RoleSelection login screen and a Dashboard with contributions/expenses/charts.
directory_structure: Root: index.html, package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig*.json. src/: main.tsx (entry), App.tsx (router), index.css, constants.ts, types.ts. src/hooks/: useLocalStorage.ts. src/components/: all UI components (Dashboard, BudgetSummary, ContributionChart, ContributionForm, ContributionList, ExpenseForm, ExpenseList, ResetData, RoleSelection).
